Members of Ibn Haldun University Gathered at the Traditional Family Iftar

24.02.2026

The tradition continued this year as our Family Iftar brought the members of Ibn Haldun University together on our campus.

The Ibn Haldun University Family Iftar took place on Monday, February 23, at the Student Center. The event, which united the IHU family, was attended by members of the Board of Trustees, academics, administrative staff, students, and alumni.

During the iftar program; the President of the Board of Trustees, Prof. İrfan Gündüz, the Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees, Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan, and our Rector, Prof. Atilla Arkan, delivered speeches emphasizing messages of unity and solidarity.

The iftar program concluded following a recitation from the Holy Qur'an and a Sufi music performance by the ensemble conducted by Ender Doğan.
